full_text:
Xin Pi (Zuozhi) 辛毗 (佐治)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xin Pi (辛毗), styledZuozhi (佐治). Sent as envoy to Cao Cao but instead urged Cao Cao to attack the Yuan’s. Hugged by Cao Pi. Xin Pi was affiliated with Yuan Shao, Yuan Tan, and the Wei Kingdom. Xin Pi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
